overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit dystopian city. The player character walks through wet streets, narrow alleys with steam vents, and under overpasses with market stalls, showcasing the game's detailed urban environment with ray-traced lighting and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with corporate buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along wet pavement past neon signs and the Delamain corporate building

entered.detail: tall teal building with illuminated Delamain signage on multiple floors
large pink neon pig logo on building facade
tall street light illuminating the sidewalk
multi-story building with various neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet commercial street at night, with the Delamain building dominating the right side. Neon signs including a distinctive pink pig logo illuminate the scene, reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement. The player walks forward through this sparse urban environment with no significant events occurring.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with construction barriers and steam vents

events.description: steam vent releases white vapor across the path creating atmospheric fog

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow alley with construction barriers, passing through patches of steam

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket standing near construction barrier

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the path
ground vent emitting white steam into the alley
horizontal red neon light fixture along the wall
tall concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrow enclosed alleyway flanked by concrete walls and construction barriers. Red neon lighting casts an ominous glow as steam vents release fog across the path. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket stands near the barriers as the player navigates through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide downtown boulevard with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards

events.description: exits narrow alley into wide open downtown plaza with skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking down wide boulevard surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: massive illuminated skyscrapers with glass facades dominating the skyline
large digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk
yellow elevated highway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a vast downtown plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards. The player walks along the wide street toward an overpass structure in the distance, passing palm trees and moderate pedestrian traffic. The scale shifts dramatically from enclosed to expansive urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market under overpass with food stalls and vendors

events.description: entering covered market area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market passage browsing food stalls under the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white coat and red pants looking at phone while walking

entered.detail: yellow steel beams and concrete ceiling of the overpass overhead
illuminated food stall with menu displays and cooking equipment
green neon 'OPEN' sign hanging above a shop entrance
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
digital sign displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' with graphic design

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered market area beneath the yellow overpass structure, transitioning from open sky to an enclosed space with concrete pillars and beams overhead. Food vendor stalls with bright neon signs line the path, and the player walks past a pedestrian checking their phone while browsing the market offerings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit metropolis, transitioning from a rain-slicked commercial street into a claustrophobic alley before opening into a massive urban plaza and a sheltered market. It begins on a wet road dominated by the Delamain building, where pink neon signs reflect off the pavement as the camera moves forward. The scene then shifts as the player turns into a narrow, enclosed alleyway, where red lighting and steam vents create an atmospheric haze around concrete barriers and a lone pedestrian. As the camera emerges from the alley, the environment expands dramatically into a vast downtown canyon of towering skyscrapers and digital billboards, moving past palm trees toward a distant overpass. Finally, the open sky disappears as the camera enters a semi-covered market beneath the yellow overpass, passing concrete pillars and bright food vendor stalls.
